mentions.note: Formula 1 Group subsidiary pullback 23% to $83 offers terrific value; Apple TV deal locked at $140M/year vs. ESPN $85M; strong Q earnings, league peace through 2030, purer corporate structure post-spinoff. Wells Fargo upgraded from underweight; 13 buy ratings Street-wide. 42x forward PE steep but cheapest on PE basis since Aug 2023 IPO; scarcity value warrants premium. Amazing opportunity before Apple upside flows.
